title: RF elements TPA-RBC TwistPort aluminium adaptor for RouterBOARD
category: RF elements / Wireless / Antennas / TwistPort and other adapters
description: There is a completely new shielded TwistaPort adapter TPA-RBC designed for the MikroTik RouterBOARD platform. It is used to connect the RB91x , RB71x , RB4xx and RBM11 routers to the TwistPort antennas. The connection between the RouterBOARD and the TwistPort adapter is solved using two MMCX pigtails TPA-RBC is made of cast aluminium and provides excellent protection that is required in outdoor environment TPA-RBC offers more real estate inside the enclosure. It can be used for any additional equipment when building your own radio platform e.g. for radio cards with taller heath sinks TPA-RBC offers space for additional external connectors of choice. Aluminium wall allows for custom drilling or milling to fulfill various requirements
specsSearch: Connectors and Interfaces RF connectors TwistPort, (2) MMCX Physical characteristics Shielding Yes Mounting On the antenna Purpose Outdoor Material Aluminum Operating temperature [°C] 40 up to 60 Weight [g] 550 Width [mm] 173 Height [mm] 185 Depth [mm] 88
